Excellence in Air Quality. Protection You Can Breathe.

Elite Indoor Air LLC is a locally owned, award-winning indoor air quality and mold inspection company serving homeowners and businesses throughout Southeast Wisconsin. Founded by Damian Meredith, Elite Indoor Air holds an A+ BBB rating and 5-star Google reviews, reflecting its commitment to honesty, education, and results.

We specialize in comprehensive air and surface testing, mold inspections, moisture mapping, VOC (chemical) testing, and purification solutions using ActivePure® technology—the same NASA-developed innovation used in hospitals and clean rooms. Our mission is simple: to help families and property owners breathe easier and live healthier by identifying and addressing hidden indoor contaminants.

Elite Indoor Air LLC proudly serves the Greater Milwaukee area and supports community health and local business growth through integrity, innovation, and care.

Name: Ubuntu MKE / Flavors of Africa & Diaspora Wisconsin
Description:
Ubuntu MKE is the first Wisconsin-based cross-cultural, nonprofit incubator lab designed to build a more inclusive, diverse and equitable food community. It is a catalyst for community dialog, an action-driven think tank, and a ground-breaking socio-cultural experiment. 

Currently, we are working to promote our Flavors of Africa & Diaspora Best Chefs Wisconsin event. We are holding eight weeks of Immersive Workshops (September-November) where guests will participate in a series of roundtable discussions, field trips and site visits focused on education and community dialogue regarding diversity, equity and inclusion; matters relating to the LGBTQ+ community; cultural sensitivity; food literacy, the Good Food Movement, community building, food as health and more.

The event culminates with an elegant Gala on November 10, 2024 where guests will enjoy Guests will enjoy tastings, performances and an opportunity to cast votes for their favorite traditional & non-traditional African dishes. The night is set to include a culinary safari tasting experience with 40 fine dining restaurants, a Keynote Address from Michael Twitty, African American writer, culinary historian, educator and James Beard Award winning author of “The Cooking Gene”, the Best Chefs Wisconsin competition where guests will vote for their favorite dish, and entertainment Including never before seen dance and cultural performances from Nigeria, Cameroon and and Senegal.

Name: Marissa's Microgreens
Description:
Marissa's Microgreens is where fresh greens meet social change! Founded by Marissa Brown, the first Black woman microgreen farmer in Milwaukee, our mission is clear: to combat food apartheid in disadvantaged economies. 

Hailing from the vibrant city of Chicago, Marissa brings a passion for nutritious, sustainable food to every aspect of her business. With Marissa's Microgreens, she aims to not only provide access to fresh, healthy produce but also to address systemic issues of food injustice and inequality.

To Marissa microgreens isn't just a business—it's part of a larger movement. We're proud to be closely affiliated with The Brown People Foundation, a nonprofit organization dedicated to empowering marginalized communities through education, entrepreneurship, and social initiatives. Together, we're working to create a more equitable food system and a brighter future for all.

Join us in our mission to cultivate change, one microgreen at a time.

Name: The Fold Chair Collective
Description:
Paying homage to Shirley Chisholm’s call, “to bring a folding chair”, The Folding Chair Collective partners with organizations to create environments where belonging is intentional and every individual is seen as a human first and a valued asset next - not just labor. We are dedicated to transforming workplaces, campuses, and communities through leadership development, strategic equity auditing, and people-centered culture building.

Our vision is to equip leaders, organizations, and institutions with the tools to create equitable tables where every individual is recognized as person first and an asset next, empowered to contribute, and supported to thrive. Our vision is a world where safe, sustainable tables exist everywhere, built through intentional leadership, equity auditing, and human-centered practices, and where everyone has both a seat and a folding chair of their own.
